title: asterolasia muricata
intro: Asterolasia muricata, also known as the orange asterolasia or mouse apple, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Asterolasia muricata include its potential in reducing inflammation, alleviating coughs, and treating digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
